user_query:
Please execute the implementation plan under input/ using a process that dispatches a fresh worker for each independent task and runs two-stage reviews (spec compliance first, then code quality) before marking any task complete.

Read input/plan.md and input/scene.md, then:
1) Extract the full tasks (with scene-setting context) into output/extracted_tasks.json (JSON array with fields: id, title, full_text, context).
2) Create a Todo tracker at output/todo.json showing every task and its per-stage status: implementer_done, spec_review_pass, code_quality_pass, and complete.
3) Work through the tasks strictly one at a time (no parallelization). For each task N (use the IDs/titles from the plan), create a folder output/tasks/<task-id>/ containing:
   - implementer_report.md (what was implemented, tests planned/written, files changed, self-review findings)
   - spec_review.json (JSON with keys: status ["pass" or "fail"], issues [array], method: "code-inspection", base_sha, head_sha)
   - code_quality_review.json (JSON with keys: status ["pass" or "fail"], strengths [array], issues [array with severity labels], base_sha, head_sha)
   Ensure you only produce a passing code_quality_review.json after the spec_review.json is passing for that task.
4) Record the full execution order in output/execution_trace.json as an object with an "events" array. Each event must include: step (monotonic integer), task_id, event_type (one of: clarifications_asked, clarifications_answered, implementer_start, implementer_finish, spec_review_start, spec_review_finish, code_quality_review_start, code_quality_review_finish), subagent_id (unique per task), and iso8601 timestamp. Include at least one task where you ask clarifying questions and explicitly answer them before implementer_start for that task.
5) Create output/branch.txt with the feature branch name you would use (must not be "main" or "master").
6) After all tasks are complete, write output/final_review.md summarizing the overall implementation and confirming that requirements were met and the work is ready to merge.

Notes and constraints:
- Do not start work on the main branch; use a feature branch and record it in output/branch.txt.
- Never skip reviews; spec compliance must be approved before code quality review.
- Do not parallelize implementation workers. Proceed to the next task only after both reviews pass for the current task.
- Include plausible base_sha and head_sha values (hex strings) per task in the review JSON files.
- If the plan has any ambiguity, document the Q&A in the execution trace and in the implementer_report.md for the affected task.

Deliver all artifacts under output/ as specified.
